package.name: rescue_decision
package.description: Mission-level Behavior Tree runner (BehaviorTree.CPP v3) for the IA712 Project B Search and Rescue stack. Loads bt_xml/mission.xml, ticks it at a fixed rate, and exposes custom condition/action nodes wired to the project topics (/map, /coverage, /victims_map). Satisfies the assignment requirement of a real Behavior Tree engine (no FSM), viewable in Groot.
